refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements with traceability to inputs, and manage updates including baselines and calibration history.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing into derivation, recording, and management clarifies distinct functional concerns and supports traceability and history maintenance as required by constraints.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets traceable to worksite inputs and a maintained history of baseline and calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

candidate_dps: Algorithmic derivation engine using mission data inputs
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated performance requirements management system combining derivation algorithms, traceable recording, and update management

potential_sources: Tight coupling between derivation logic and data storage
Update management dependent on accurate recording
coupling_check.notes: The integrated DP logically groups related functions to minimize cross-module dependencies and supports traceability.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and accuracy of mission context data
Risk of data inconsistency if update management is not robust
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing update management if complexity grows to reduce coupling.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: System-level software module responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives mission context and operational data for derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance targets to other system components

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports update synchronization and history management with external systems

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as this module centralizes performance requirement functions; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle module has limited relevance; assigning here would increase diffusion and duplication.
Teleoperation module unrelated to performance requirement derivation and management.
Safety Services may consume performance data but not responsible for derivation or management.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing performance requirement derivation and management in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports traceability.
containment_risks: Potential complexity growth in NGHE Solution module if other unrelated functions are added
Dependency on accurate and timely telemetry data input
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module complexity and consider sub-modularization within NGHE Solution if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR sub-functions with clear traceability and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized containment in NGHE Solution module
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores strongly favor NGHE Solution module, supporting architectural clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via documented traceability and history records within the NGHE Solution module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of functional requirements to NGHE Solution module with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Track complexity growth in NGHE Solution module for potential future modularization
Ensure telemetry data quality and availability to mitigate input risks

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meet the requirements and constraints with acceptable risk and architectural clarity.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

revise.why: No immediate revisions required; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Mission context data is accurate and timely
NGHE Solution module can handle integrated DP complexity
open_risks: Telemetry data quality impacting derivation accuracy
Potential complexity growth in NGHE Solution module
evidence_needed: Demonstration of traceability from inputs to performance targets
History management of baselines and calibration updates
